docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,646.00 FILED BY CARBAJAL, PABLO AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, EULALIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2022 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARBAJAL, PABLO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, EULALIO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARBAJAL, PABLO
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF CARBAJAL, PABLO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SHERIFF'S SERVICE FEE $40 WAIVED) SERVED JUN-09-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, EULALIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF PABLO CARBAJAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EULAIO MATINEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA. SCRIBBLER'S ERROR IS CORRECTED IN COURT ON DEFENDANT'S LAST NAME IS MARTINEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
